title: Raccoon Removal in New Hyde Park, Long Island | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in New Hyde Park, NY. Licensed experts serving Long Island homes and businesses. Fast response, humane trapping, exclusion. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: New Hyde Park homeowners know that raccoons can cause serious damage to attics, chimneys, and property when they move in uninvited. Our licensed raccoon removal specialists provide humane, effective solutions for residential and commercial properties throughout this Nassau County community. With same-day emergency service available, we protect New Hyde Park families from the health risks and structural damage raccoons bring.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served New Hyde Park and Long Island for years with certified wildlife technicians who understand local raccoon behavior and entry patterns. We offer comprehensive services including humane trapping, complete exclusion work, attic restoration, and a satisfaction guarantee that keeps your property raccoon-free.
localContext: New Hyde Park's tree-lined streets, classic Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to parks like Deepdale Golf Club create ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics and crawl spaces. Our team is familiar with the unique architecture of homes near New Hyde Park Road and the Garden City Park border, ensuring effective exclusion tailored to your property's specific vulnerabilities.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in New Hyde Park typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring repair, and whether attic cleanup or restoration is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in New Hyde Park neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in New Hyde Park due to the mature trees, accessible food sources, and older homes with potential entry points in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. They're especially active in spring when mothers seek nesting sites and in fall when they search for winter shelter.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in Nassau County?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations and Nassau County ordinances for humane wildlife removal. Our methods prioritize live trapping and relocation when permitted, or exclusion techniques that allow raccoons to leave but not return, especially important when babies are present.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon emergency in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for New Hyde Park residents dealing with raccoons in living spaces or urgent situations. Our team typically arrives within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours, with 24/7 availability for true emergencies where raccoons pose immediate safety risks.
